folders.title: Folders
folders.name: Folder name
folders.notEmpty: The folder contains projects: move or delete them first.
folders.empty: No folders yet. Create one to get started.

projects.name: Project name
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Its tracked time will no longer appear in reports.
projects.select: Select a project from the sidebar
projects.noEntries: No entries yet. Start the timer!
projects.rateHelp: Pick a profile or set a manual hourly rate. Reports and costs use this rate.
projects.rateManualHint: Editing the rate by hand switches the project to a manual rate.

timer.noteBody: You can describe what you worked on during this segment. It is optional.

idle.title: Are you still there?
idle.body: No activity for {{minutes}} minutes while the timer was running. Keep this time in the session, or stop the timer at the moment you went away?

reports.title: Reports
reports.noData: No entries in the selected period.
reports.pdfProjectOnly: Select a project to export the PDF

popover.reminderBody: You are using {{app}}: start the timer?

settings.title: Settings
settings.pdfExportDirHelp: Folder path where project exports (PDF, JSON, CSV) are saved. You can also use ~/Documents/MoonyTask.

rates.title: Rate profiles
rates.help: Create reusable profiles with a name, payment type, and hourly rate. The default profile is applied to new projects and can be changed in the project sheet.
rates.name: Name

settings.watchedAppsHelp: If you use one of these apps without an active timer, MoonyTask opens the menu bar popover and shows a reminder for 10 seconds.

sync.title: Google sync
sync.help: Your data is stored in a hidden folder of your Google Drive. Auto-sync: on every change, every 15 minutes, on timer stop and when the app quits.
sync.notConfigured: OAuth credentials are not embedded in the app yet: add them to src-tauri/google_credentials.json and rebuild (see SETUP.md).
sync.connectHelp: Your browser will open to authorize access with this Google account.

support.title: Support
support.help: To report bugs or issues, you can write directly to MoonyTask support.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.resetHelp: Deletes every folder, project, tracked hour, and payment. Settings (language, theme, rate profiles) are kept.
danger.resetStep1Body: All projects, folders, tracked time, and payments will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

settings.pdfTotalsOnly: Hide row costs in the PDF
settings.pdfTotalsOnlyHelp: When enabled, the PDF keeps the summary and table, but the table shows only day and time.
settings.autoMergeDaily: Automatically merge daily times per project
settings.autoMergeDailyHelp: On every pause or stop the app still asks what you did, but entries of the same project are summed into a single daily entry.
